```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:LEN": {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
      "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _rng_one() -> float:\r\n    return 1.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _rng_zero() -> float:\r\n    return 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_increases_and_is_capped() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    d1 = compute_backoff_seconds(1, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d2 = compute_backoff_seconds(2, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d3 = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d5 = compute_backoff_seconds(5, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n\r\n    assert d1 == base\r\n    assert d2 == base * mult\r\n    assert d3 == base * mult**2\r\n    assert d5 == cap\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_uses_jitter_bounds() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    low = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_zero)\r\n    high = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n\r\n    assert low == 0.0\r\n    assert high == min(cap, base * mult**2)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_rejects_non_positive_attempt() -> None:\r\n    with pytest.raises(ValueError):\r\n        compute_backoff_seconds(0, base=1.0, multiplier=2.0, cap=10.0)\r\n\r\n"
    },
    "2:LEN": "0f4c2cd70a1bb607a7b1ad230be1da46d1cb88bd54cb07391a4d30ca8744af5e",
    "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
  },
  "5:LEN": [
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "."
    }
  ],
  "6:VARINT": 1
}
```

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4842195278606858022}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "4:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _rng_one() -> float:\r\n    return 1.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _rng_zero() -> float:\r\n    return 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_increases_and_is_capped() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    d1 = compute_backoff_seconds(1, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d2 = compute_backoff_seconds(2, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d3 = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n    d5 = compute_backoff_seconds(5, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n\r\n    assert d1 == base\r\n    assert d2 == base * mult\r\n    assert d3 == base * mult**2\r\n    assert d5 == cap\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_uses_jitter_bounds() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    low = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_zero)\r\n    high = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=_rng_one)\r\n\r\n    assert low == 0.0\r\n    assert high == min(cap, base * mult**2)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_rejects_non_positive_attempt() -> None:\r\n    with pytest.raises(ValueError):\r\n        compute_backoff_seconds(0, base=1.0, multiplier=2.0, cap=10.0)\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "0f4c2cd70a1bb607a7b1ad230be1da46d1cb88bd54cb07391a4d30ca8744af5e", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "5:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "6:VARINT": 1}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
